text.name: system_description
text.text: The Cassette Vision is a second generation home video game console made by Epoch and released in Japan on July 30, 1981. The introduction of next-generation systems from Nintendo, Casio and Sega quickly pushed back the original Cassette Vision, leading Epoch to quickly develop a successor, the Super Cassette Vision. The term cassette is a contemporary Japanese synonym for ROM cartridge.
